title: Urgent appeal: Jessie and Reaper need a forever home!
description: GEORGE NEWS - Meet Jessie and Reaper- our...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Meet Jessie and Reaper- our lively “pigeon pair” who bring double the trouble but double the love.


> This bonded two-year-old duo was surrendered to us after coming in for sterilisation, and heartbreakingly, their owners decided not to take them back.


They adore each other, and we’d love to see them adopted together into a home where they can stay side by side. Jessie and Reaper are full of energy, but at heart they’re the sweetest pair - just waiting for someone to give them the love they deserve.

- Available for adoption now - please don’t let them wait too long.
- Contact the Garden Route SPCA on 044 878 1990 today to meet them.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
